name: asknet Solutions AG
summary: asknet Solutions AG engages in the areas of procurement, e-commerce, and payment transactions. The company offers software procurement and sales services for European academic institutions, students, and graduates. Its premium distribution services and tailored portals are primarily designed to optimize IT procurement of universities, schools, and research institutes. The company also provides intelligent solutions for digital and cloud commerce, including subscription management and billing services, in-application purchase, mobile shop, B2B commerce, and support and testing services. The company was formerly known as Nexway AG and changed its name to asknet Solutions AG in August 2020. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Karlsruhe, Germany. asknet Solutions AG was formerly a  subsidiary of Facebank AG.
